title: Verify the presence of the 'Headlines' tab at the top of the screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Headlines' section.
expected_result: The 'Headlines' tab should be visible at the top of the screen.

title: Verify the functionality of the main navigation menu
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Headlines' section. | Click on the downward chevron in the main navigation menu to view more options.
expected_result: The main navigation menu should expand to show additional options.

title: Verify the functionality of the login prompt
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Headlines' section. | Click on the login prompt.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the login screen.

title: Verify the functionality of the search icon in the header
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Headlines' section. | Click on the search icon in the header.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the search screen.

title: Verify the functionality of the main content area
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Headlines' section.
expected_result: The main content area should display a large image of a missile launch with a caption about a reported missile launch in North Korea.
